vocab.meaning: cách tiếp cận liên ngành (kết hợp nhiều lĩnh vực)
vocab.example: My major adopts an interdisciplinary approach, blending principles of sociology with data science.

vocab.meaning: quá trình học hỏi khó khăn lúc ban đầu
vocab.example: Architecture has a remarkably steep learning curve, especially when mastering complex 3D modeling software.
A large portion of my studies involves critiquing the theoretical framework behind modern economic policies.

vocab.meaning: đào tạo nghề/mang tính thực hành nghề nghiệp
vocab.example: Unlike purely academic degrees, my course focuses on vocational training to ensure we are job-ready.

vocab.meaning: chiều rộng và chiều sâu (kiến thức)
vocab.example: The program provides both breadth and depth in International Relations, covering everything from history to current diplomacy.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu thực nghiệm (dựa trên quan sát/số liệu thực tế)
vocab.example: I spent most of my final year conducting empirical research to validate my thesis on consumer behavior.
History is more than just memorizing dates; it is a scholarly pursuit that requires intense archival investigation.

vocab.meaning: được săn đón nồng nhiệt (thường nói về bằng cấp/kỹ năng)
vocab.example: I am specializing in Cybersecurity, which is a highly sought-after expertise in today’s digital landscape.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm túc về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: The intellectual rigor of a Physics degree really pushes students to think outside the box.

vocab.meaning: đồ án tốt nghiệp/dự án cuối khóa quan trọng
vocab.example: For my capstone project, I’m developing an app that helps elderly people manage their medications.
